subcodes.first_line: O Hashim! The Promise hath come to pass, whereof the Promised One Himself doth testify. The Hidden One hath been made manifest, and beareth witness thereto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا هاشم قد جاء الوعد یشهد بذلک الموعود قد ظهر المکنون و شهد به
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
